# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Json = null | boolean | number | string | Json[] | { [k: string]: Json };

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200, headers: HeadersInit = {}) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(message: string, status = 400, details?: unknown) {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message, details }, status);
}

function parseLimit(v: string | null, def = 50, max = 200) {
  const n = v ? Number(v) : def;
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return def;
  return Math.min(Math.floor(n), max);
}

function parseCursor(v: string | null): string | undefined {
  if (!v) return undefined;
  try {
    const s = atob(v);
    return s;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

function encodeCursor(v: string): string {
  return btoa(v);
}

function normalizeKeyPart(v: string): string {
  return v.trim();
}

function isSafeKeyPart(v: string): boolean {
  if (!v) return false;
  if (v.length > 256) return false;
  if (v.includes("\0")) return false;
  return true;
}

function getFiltersFromParams(params: URLSearchParams): Record<string, string> {
  const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of params.entries()) {
    if (
      k === "limit" ||
      k === "cursor" ||
      k === "prefix" ||
      k === "q" ||
      k === "fields" ||
      k === "sort" ||
      k === "order"
    ) continue;
    if (k.startsWith("_")) continue;
    const nk = normalizeKeyPart(k);
    const nv = normalizeKeyPart(v);
    if (!isSafeKeyPart(nk) || !isSafeKeyPart(nv)) continue;
    filters[nk] = nv;
  }
  return filters;
}

function parseFields(params: URLSearchParams): string[] | null {
  const f = params.get("fields");
  if (!f) return null;
  const parts = f.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const safe = parts.filter((p) => isSafeKeyPart(p));
  return safe.length ? safe : null;
}

function pickFields(obj: unknown, fields: string[] | null): unknown {
  if (!fields) return obj;
  if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return obj;
  const o = obj as Record<string, unknown>;
  const out: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const f of fields) {
    if (f in o) out[f] = o[f];
  }
  return out;
}

function buildIndexKey(userId: string, filterKey: string, filterValue: string, entityId: string) {
  return ["users", userId, "idx", filterKey, filterValue, entityId] as const;
}

function buildEntityKey(userId: string, entityId: string) {
  return ["users", userId, "entity", entityId] as const;
}

async function ensureUser(userId: string) {
  const key = ["users", userId, "meta"] as const;
  const res = await kv.get(key);
  if (!res.value) {
    await kv.set(key, { createdAt: Date.now() });
  }
}

async function createEntity(userId: string, entity: Record<string, Json>) {
  const id = crypto.randomUUID();
  const now = Date.now();
  const stored = { id, ...entity, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now };

  const entityKey = buildEntityKey(userId, id);

  const filters: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(entity)) {
    if (v === null || v === undefined) continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" || typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean") {
      const fk = normalizeKeyPart(k);
      const fv = normalizeKeyPart(String(v));
      if (isSafeKeyPart(fk) && isSafeKeyPart(fv)) filters.push([fk, fv]);
    }
  }

  const ops: Array<Promise<unknown>> = [];
  ops.push(kv.set(entityKey, stored));

  for (const [fk, fv] of filters) {
    const idxKey = buildIndexKey(userId, fk, fv, id);
    ops.push(kv.set(idxKey, true));
  }

  await Promise.all(ops);
  return stored;
}

async function updateEntity(userId: string, entityId: string, patch: Record<string, Json>) {
  const entityKey = buildEntityKey(userId, entityId);
  const existing = await kv.get<Record<string, Json>>(entityKey);
  if (!existing.value) return null;

  const prev = existing.value as Record<string, Json>;
  const next: Record<string, Json> = { ...prev, ...patch, id: entityId, updatedAt: Date.now() };

  const prevIndexPairs: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(prev)) {
    if (k === "id" || k === "createdAt" || k === "updatedAt") continue;
    if (v === null || v === undefined) continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" || typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean") {
      const fk = normalizeKeyPart(k);
      const fv = normalizeKeyPart(String(v));
      if (isSafeKeyPart(fk) && isSafeKeyPart(fv)) prevIndexPairs.push([fk, fv]);
    }
  }

  const nextIndexPairs: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(next)) {
    if (k === "id" || k === "createdAt" || k === "updatedAt") continue;
    if (v === null || v === undefined) continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" || typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean") {
      const fk = normalizeKeyPart(k);
      const fv = normalizeKeyPart(String(v));
      if (isSafeKeyPart(fk) && isSafeKeyPart(fv)) nextIndexPairs.push([fk, fv]);
    }
  }

  const prevSet = new Set(prevIndexPairs.map(([a, b]) => `${a}\u0001${b}`));
  const nextSet = new Set(nextIndexPairs.map(([a, b]) => `${a}\u0001${b}`));

  const ops: Array<Promise<unknown>> = [];
  ops.push(kv.set(entityKey, next));

  for (const [fk, fv] of prevIndexPairs) {
    const key = `${fk}\u0001${fv}`;
    if (!nextSet.has(key)) {
      ops.push(kv.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, fk, fv, entityId)));
    }
  }

  for (const [fk, fv] of nextIndexPairs) {
    const key = `${fk}\u0001${fv}`;
    if (!prevSet.has(key)) {
      ops.push(kv.set(buildIndexKey(userId, fk, fv, entityId), true));
    }
  }

  await Promise.all(ops);
  return next;
}

async function deleteEntity(userId: string, entityId: string) {
  const entityKey = buildEntityKey(userId, entityId);
  const existing = await kv.get<Record<string, Json>>(entityKey);
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const prev = existing.value as Record<string, Json>;
  const indexPairs: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(prev)) {
    if (k === "id" || k === "createdAt" || k === "updatedAt") continue;
    if (v === null || v === undefined) continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" || typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean") {
      const fk = normalizeKeyPart(k);
      const fv = normalizeKeyPart(String(v));
      if (isSafeKeyPart(fk) && isSafeKeyPart(fv)) indexPairs.push([fk, fv]);
    }
  }

  const ops: Array<Promise<unknown>> = [];
  ops.push(kv.delete(entityKey));
  for (const [fk, fv] of indexPairs) {
    ops.push(kv.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, fk, fv, entityId)));
  }
  await Promise.all(ops);
  return true;
}

async function listAllEntities(userId: string, limit: number, cursor?: string) {
  const prefix = ["users", userId, "entity"] as const;
  const iter = kv.list<Record<string, Json>>({ prefix }, { limit, cursor });
  const items: Record<string, Json>[] = [];
  let lastCursor: string | undefined;

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    items.push(entry.value as Record<string, Json>);
    lastCursor = entry.cursor;
  }

  return { items, cursor: lastCursor };
}

async function searchBySingleFilter(
  userId: string,
  filterKey: string,
  filterValue: string,
  limit: number,
  cursor?: string,
) {
  const prefix = ["users", userId, "idx", filterKey, filterValue] as const;
  const iter = kv.list<boolean>({ prefix }, { limit, cursor });
  const ids: string[] = [];
  let lastCursor: string | undefined;

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    const key = entry.key as unknown as (string | number | bigint | boolean | Uint8Array)[];
    const entityId = String(key[key.length - 1]);
    ids.push(entityId);
    lastCursor = entry.cursor;
  }

  const entities = await Promise.all(ids.map((id) => kv.get<Record<string, Json>>(buildEntityKey(userId, id))));
  const items = entities.map((r) => r.value).filter(Boolean) as Record<string, Json>[];

  return { items, cursor: lastCursor };
}

async function searchByMultipleFilters(
  userId: string,
  filters: Record<string, string>,
  limit: number,
) {
  const entries = Object.entries(filters);
  if (entries.length === 0) return { items: [], cursor: undefined as string | undefined };

  const lists = await Promise.all(entries.map(async ([fk, fv]) => {
    const prefix = ["users", userId, "idx", fk, fv] as const;
    const ids: string[] = [];
    for await (const entry of kv.list<boolean>({ prefix }, { limit: 500 })) {
      const key = entry.key as unknown as (string | number | bigint | boolean | Uint8Array)[];
      ids.push(String(key[key.length - 1]));
      if (ids.length >= 5000) break;
    }
    return ids;
  }));

  lists.sort((a, b) => a.length - b.length);
  let intersection = new Set(lists[0] ?? []);
  for (let i = 1; i < lists.length; i++) {
    const s = new Set(lists[i]);
    intersection = new Set([...intersection].filter((id) => s.has(id)));
    if (intersection.size === 0) break;
  }

  const ids = [...intersection].slice(0, limit);
  const entities = await Promise.all(ids.map((id) => kv.get<Record<string, Json>>(buildEntityKey(userId, id))));
  const items = entities.map((r) => r.value).filter(Boolean) as Record<string, Json>[];

  return { items, cursor: undefined as string | undefined };
}

function getUserIdFromRequest(req: Request, url: URL): string | null {
  const fromPath = url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean)[1] ?? null;
  const fromHeader = req.headers.get("x-user-id");
  const fromQuery = url.searchParams.get("userId");
  const userId = fromPath || fromHeader || fromQuery;
  if (!userId) return null;
  const n = normalizeKeyPart(userId);
  if (!isSafeKeyPart(n)) return null;
  return n;
}

async function handleSearch(req: Request, url: URL, userId: string) {
  const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"), 50, 200);
  const cursorRaw = parseCursor(url.searchParams.get("cursor"));
  const fields = parseFields(url.searchParams);

  const filters = getFiltersFromParams(url.searchParams);

  const entries = Object.entries(filters);
  if (entries.length === 0) {
    const { items, cursor } = await listAllEntities(userId, limit, cursorRaw);
    return jsonResponse({
      userId,
      count: items.length,
      items: items.map((it) => pickFields(it, fields)),
      cursor: cursor ? encodeCursor(cursor) : null,
    });
  }

  if (entries.length === 1) {
    const [fk, fv] = entries[0];
    const { items, cursor } = await searchBySingleFilter(userId, fk, fv, limit, cursorRaw);
    return jsonResponse({
      userId,
      filters,
      count: items.length,
      items: items.map((it) => pickFields(it, fields)),
      cursor: cursor ? encodeCursor(cursor) : null,
    });
  }

  const { items } = await searchByMultipleFilters(userId, filters, limit);
  return jsonResponse({
    userId,
    filters,
    count: items.length,
    items: items.map((it) => pickFields(it, fields)),
    cursor: null,
  });
}

async function handleCreate(req: Request, userId: string) {
  let body: unknown;
  try {
    body = await req.json();
  } catch {
    return errorResponse("Invalid JSON body", 400);
  }
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    return errorResponse("Body must be a JSON object", 400);
  }
  await ensureUser(userId);
  const entity = await createEntity(userId, body as Record<string, Json>);
  return jsonResponse(entity, 201);
}

async function handleUpdate(req: Request, userId: string, entityId: string) {
  let body: unknown;
  try {
    body = await req.json();
  } catch {
    return errorResponse("Invalid JSON body", 400);
  }
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    return errorResponse("Body must be a JSON object", 400);
  }
  const updated = await updateEntity(userId, entityId, body as Record<string, Json>);
  if (!updated) return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  return jsonResponse(updated, 200);
}

async function handleDelete(_req: Request, userId: string, entityId: string) {
  const ok = await deleteEntity(userId, entityId);
  if (!ok) return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  return jsonResponse({ ok: true }, 200);
}

async function handleGet(req: Request, userId: string, entityId: string) {
  const fields = parseFields(new URL(req.url).searchParams);
  const res = await kv.get<Record<string, Json>>(buildEntityKey(userId, entityId));
  if (!res.value) return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  return jsonResponse(pickFields(res.value, fields), 200);
}

function route(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const parts = url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);

  if (parts[0] !== "users") return { kind: "notfound" as const };

  const userId = parts[1] ?? null;
  if (!userId) return { kind: "badrequest" as const, message: "Missing userId in path /users/:userId/..." };

  if (parts.length === 3 && parts[2] === "search") return { kind: "search" as const, userId };
  if (parts.length === 3 && parts[2] === "entities") return { kind: "entities" as const, userId };
  if (parts.length === 4 && parts[2] === "entities") return { kind: "entity" as const, userId, entityId: parts[3] };

  return { kind: "notfound" as const };
}

serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  const routed = route(req);
  if (routed.kind === "badrequest") return errorResponse(routed.message, 400);
  if (routed.kind === "notfound") return errorResponse("Not found", 404);

  const userId = normalizeKeyPart(routed.userId);
  if (!isSafeKeyPart(userId)) return errorResponse("Invalid userId", 400);

  const corsHeaders: HeadersInit = {
    "access-control-allow-origin": "*",
    "access-control-allow-methods": "GET,POST,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS",
    "access-control-allow-headers": "content-type,x-user-id",
  };

  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders });

  try {
    if (routed.kind === "search") {
      if (req.method !== "GET") return errorResponse("Method not allowed", 405);
      const res = await handleSearch(req, url, userId);
      const h = new Headers(res.headers);
      for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
      return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
    }

    if (routed.kind === "entities") {
      if (req.method === "POST") {
        const res = await handleCreate(req, userId);
        const h = new Headers(res.headers);
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
        return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
      }
      if (req.method === "GET") {
        const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"), 50, 200);
        const cursorRaw = parseCursor(url.searchParams.get("cursor"));
        const fields = parseFields(url.searchParams);
        const { items, cursor } = await listAllEntities(userId, limit, cursorRaw);
        const res = jsonResponse({
          userId,
          count: items.length,
          items: items.map((it) => pickFields(it, fields)),
          cursor: cursor ? encodeCursor(cursor) : null,
        });
        const h = new Headers(res.headers);
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
        return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
      }
      return errorResponse("Method not allowed", 405);
    }

    if (routed.kind === "entity") {
      const entityId = normalizeKeyPart(routed.entityId);
      if (!isSafeKeyPart(entityId)) return errorResponse("Invalid entityId", 400);

      if (req.method === "GET") {
        const res = await handleGet(req, userId, entityId);
        const h = new Headers(res.headers);
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
        return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
      }
      if (req.method === "PATCH") {
        const res = await handleUpdate(req, userId, entityId);
        const h = new Headers(res.headers);
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
        return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
      }
      if (req.method === "DELETE") {
        const res = await handleDelete(req, userId, entityId);
        const h = new Headers(res.headers);
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(corsHeaders)) h.set(k, String(v));
        return new Response(res.body, { status: res.status, headers: h });
      }
      return errorResponse("Method not allowed", 405);
    }

    return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  } catch (err) {
    return errorResponse("Internal error", 500, { message: String(err?.message ?? err) });
  }
});
